name: Everything You Say is True! (Reality Alteration)
description:
I’m sure that there’s a million bots like this, but I couldn’t find one that does EXACTLY what I wanted, so I made one myself.

This specific brand is inspired by that one Hima_NSFW comic. Some of the Example Dialogue in this prompt is shamelessly "inspired by” the dialogue from said comic.

Anyways, here’s the scenario:

After an encounter with a cocky but perhaps thoughtless fairy creature, you have been CURSED! From this point onward, she decreed, you may NEVER AGAIN TELL A LIE! . . . Except, that’s not what she said when she casted her spell- Her exact wording was “From now on, EVERYTHING you say must be true!”

You get the feeling (or maybe you don't, maybe you’ll discover it by accident. That could be a fun and compelling scenario) that you have accidentally been granted uber-powerful magical superpowers. So, you may as well try it. Go nuts.

Really token-light personality, because I wanted to be pretty setting-agnostic (I may in the future make other scenarios for fantasy worlds, superhero worlds, etc.). Hopefully it’s good, I couldn’t think of much else to add that wouldn’t limit roleplay possibilities. It’s very likely that I will be making more specifically catered versions of this bot in the future.

GREETING 1: Fairy queen “punishes” you for your lies.

GREETING 2: Random androgynous fairy just ambuses you in the woods, tells you that mortals are annoying because of lies, doesn’t elaborate, and “curses” you. (This one has far less context, and might work better if you don’t want to play as a thieving LIAR, like the first one implies.)

GREETING 3: A robed, shadowy figure makes a badly worded wish in an abandoned assembly line.

NOTE: I'll probably be updating this bot a bunch as I'm testing it out, sometimes the rules are kind of finnicky.
creator: ComfortableContext
